discovery.run_summary: Risk-on tape with QQQ +2.5%, SMH +3.3%, and VIX down through 18. Mega-cap tech (GOOGL, TSLA, AMZN, TSM) leading; energy and materials lagging on oil softening after US-Iran de-escalation. Mid-cap movers are a mixed bag with no obvious 8-K catalysts attached.

notable_index_moves: SMH +3.33% — semis driving the tape, likely lifting ONTO via sympathy
XLB -1.82% — materials notably weak against broad rally
IWM -0.29% — small caps diverging from large-cap rally, breadth narrow

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.setup: Semi-equipment name riding broad SMH rally with no company-specific catalyst
discoveries.thesis: ONTO +8.5% on a day SMH is +3.3% and TSM +5.3% is a high-beta sympathy move within a sector tailwind. Volume only 1.18x average suggests this isn't a news-driven re-rate — it's beta. Five-day change is roughly flat, so this is a one-day catch-up rather than a trend break.
discoveries.what_confirms: No 8-K, no earnings within window, no peer-specific news targeting metrology/inspection — confirms sympathy/beta read.
discoveries.what_kills: If an after-hours 8-K appears (large order win, guidance raise) or a sell-side note tied specifically to ONTO surfaces, this becomes UNDERDONE rather than RATIONAL.
discoveries.catalyst: Sector beta to SMH +3.3% / TSM +5.3% rally; no company-specific news detected
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals is empty {}, volume only 1.18x avg despite 8.5% move — consistent with beta amplification not idiosyncratic news
research_pointers: Check if any sell-side initiation or PT raise hit ONTO today
Compare ONTO move to KLAC/LRCX/AMAT — if all up similar magnitude, pure sympathy
Note Q2 earnings cadence — pre-positioning risk into next print

discoveries.name: Repligen Corporation
discoveries.setup: Bioprocessing name down sharply against rising XBI and positive Regeneron FDA news for a different company
discoveries.thesis: RGEN -6.8% on 1.57x volume with XBI +1.9% is a meaningful divergence. No 8-K, no scheduled earnings. The Regeneron FDA PreCheck headline is for REGN (different company) — possible ticker confusion unwind if traders bought RGEN by mistake earlier and are now reversing, but I cannot confirm that mechanism from available data. Without a clear catalyst I can't articulate either side at conf 3+.
discoveries.what_confirms: If RGEN was up sharply in prior session(s) on REGN ticker confusion, today's fade confirms reversal mechanism — would lean OVERDONE on the downside.
discoveries.what_kills: If a customer-loss, guidance cut, or competitor (Danaher/Cytiva) win announcement is found, the move is justified and RATIONAL.
discoveries.what_to_learn: Ticker-confusion trades (REGN vs RGEN, ZM vs ZOOM-historical) create transient mispricings — worth checking prior-session moves when a name diverges from sector with no news.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — possible REGN/RGEN ticker confusion unwind given REGN FDA news, but unconfirmed
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: RGEN had a 5-day +8.2% run into today, then drops 6.8% on the day Regeneron (REGN) gets FDA positive headline — pattern consistent with confusion unwind but not proven
research_pointers: Check RGEN intraday tape on dates of prior REGN news to confirm confusion pattern
Scan for any bioprocessing customer commentary (Lilly, Moderna capex)
Check options unusual activity for institutional positioning

discoveries.name: Five Below, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Discount retailer down on a risk-on day with XLY +2.4%, no catalyst signals
discoveries.thesis: FIVE -5.4% on average volume with XLY +2.4% is a sharp relative-strength break (~8% underperformance). Five-day is -7.9%, so this is a continuation of weakness, not a one-day surprise. No 8-K, no earnings imminent. Possible tariff/import-cost narrative since FIVE is heavily China-sourced and a risk-on tape might be lifting names with better domestic exposure while leaving import-dependent names behind — but I can't anchor that at conf 3+ without a specific headline.
discoveries.what_confirms: Tariff/China-sourcing headline today, downgrade from a major broker, or peer (DLTR, DG, OLLI) showing similar relative weakness.
discoveries.what_kills: If DLTR/DG/OLLI are up with sector, FIVE-specific issue (channel check, mgmt commentary) is implied; if they're all down, it's a discount-retail narrative.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — possible continuation of tariff/import-cost concern, but no specific catalyst in feed
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals; 5-day -7.9% indicates ongoing weakness not a fresh event
research_pointers: Compare to DLTR, DG, OLLI today — sector vs idiosyncratic
Check for any tariff/China sourcing news in past 5 days
Look for broker actions in past week
Check next earnings date — pre-print positioning?

discoveries.name: JetBlue Airways Corporation
discoveries.setup: Small-cap airline down sharply with no catalyst on a day oil is softer and XLI is up
discoveries.thesis: JBLU -6.2% is a notable divergence on a risk-on day with oil weakening (which should help airlines) and XLI +0.86%. Volume below average (0.9x), suggesting this isn't capitulation but possibly a forced seller or a single broker action. No 8-K, no earnings near. JBLU is a low-priced, high-short-interest, balance-sheet-stressed name where moves of this size are routine and often technical. Can't articulate either direction at conf 3+.
discoveries.what_confirms: Broker downgrade, capacity/RASM commentary from peer (LUV, AAL), or fuel hedge unwind disclosure.
discoveries.what_kills: If peer airlines (LUV, AAL, UAL, ALK) also down 3-5%, sector narrative; if JBLU alone, idiosyncratic (Spirit-related credit, route news, etc.).
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — no detectable catalyst in feed
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals, below-average volume on a sharp percentage move — possibly low-float technical noise rather than news
research_pointers: Compare against LUV, AAL, UAL, ALK for sector vs idiosyncratic
Check JBLU credit spreads / bonds for distress signal
Scan for any Spirit Airlines bankruptcy/restructuring news (JBLU exposure)

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Comcast announces tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky

discovery.no_signals_note: Movers list is light and three of four have empty catalyst_signals. ONTO is best explained as semi sympathy (RATIONAL). RGEN, FIVE, JBLU all flagged UNCLEAR — directional theses available only at conf 2, below the gate. The most actionable item tonight is the Comcast spinoff catalyst chain into other legacy media names, not the mover list itself.

ai_announcements.headline: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease 'RAMageddon'
ai_announcements.summary: Samsung and SK Hynix pledge massive capex for memory fab expansion to address AI-driven HBM/DRAM shortages.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Onto Innovation supplies metrology/inspection equipment for advanced packaging (HBM) and memory fabs. Massive Korean memory capex is a direct tailwind, not a threat. The move appears RATIONAL — more fabs = more tool orders.
research_pointers: Confirm ONTO's HBM/advanced packaging revenue exposure to Samsung + SK Hynix
Check if any other catalyst (analyst upgrade, peer guidance) explains the 8.5% move given only 1.18x volume
Compare reaction vs peers KLAC, CAMT, NVMI for sympathy confirmation
KILL thesis: if move was driven by unrelated company-specific news (M&A, guidance)

ai_announcements.headline: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
ai_announcements.summary: Anthropic secures California state government as customer at 50% discount; framing notes friction with federal government. ANTHROPIC-RELATED CALL — flagged for bias grading.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Other moving stocks (RGEN, JBLU, FIVE) have no plausible link to today's AI announcements — RGEN is bioprocessing, JBLU is airlines, FIVE is discount retail with a prior multi-day decline likely tied to consumer/guidance issues. No AI-driven selloff thesis to call overdone or underdone. Cursor mobile app and Gemini free image gen are incremental; no public pure-play stocks directly affected in today's movers list.
